§6Biometric Card§f:
The §6Biometric Card §f(appliedenergistics2:biometric_card) is a §6player-locked §f §6settings storage device §f that §6stores the configuration §f of an AE2 block AND the §bplayer ID §f who set it. It is the §6security tool §f for AE2.

§6Production Path (tools/network_biometric_card.json)§f:
Pattern "abb / cdc" (2x3 pattern):
- §ba§f: §6Engineering Processor §f(appliedenergistics2:material:24) — 1 (top left)
- §bb§f: §6Iron Ingot §f(ingotIron) — 2 (top middle, top right)
- §cc§f: §6Gold Ingot §f(ingotGold) — 2 (middle left, middle right)
- §cd§f: §6Redstone Dust §f(dustRedstone) — 1 (centre)
- Yields 1× Biometric Card

§6Function§f:
- §bPlayer-locked settings §f: right-click an AE2 block to copy both its §6settings §f and your §bplayer ID §f
- §bPlayer-locked restore §f: only the §6same player §f can paste from a Biometric Card
- §bUse case §f: lock §6Storage Bus §f configurations to your §bplayer ID §f
- §bCombined with Security Terminal §f: the §6Biometric Card §f can be assigned to a §6Security Terminal §f to grant a player §6CRAFT §f or §6SECURITY §f permission
- §bCard durability §f: §b100 §f uses (each right-click counts)

§6Direct Descendants (TaskRetrieval graph)§f:
The jei-graph shows 0 items the Biometric Card is a component of, but it is referenced in 12 §6use sites §f across the mod pack. Common uses:
- §bMulti-player security §f: lock down §6crafting access §f to specific players
- §bPersonal configurations §f: keep your §6Storage Bus §f settings §cbound §f to your account
- §bSecurity Terminal assignment §f: assign §6player permissions §f to a §6Security Terminal §f

§6Practical Use§f:
- §eTip§f: pair with a §6Security Terminal §f to set up §6per-player §f network permissions
- §eTip§f: a Biometric Card §6stores the §bplayer ID §f, not the player name; renaming a player will §6break §f the binding
- §cWarning§f: the Biometric Card §cdestroys §f its previous settings on copy
- §cWarning§f: the Biometric Card §ccannot §f be shared between players; the card is §cbounded §f to the player who created it
